checkout.agreementText: By proceeding with the purchase, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.;All sales are final and non-refundable unless otherwise stated in our refund policy.;In special cases such as stock shortages, we may contact you and you may choose a partial or full refund.;Items will be delivered via RSI gift to the email address associated with your account at registration. Please make sure you can access that inbox.;This agreement is translated from the English version, and the English version shall prevail.

register.marketingEmailConsentQuestion: Would you like to receive marketing broadcast emails from Citizens Hub?
register.marketingEmailConsentYes: Yes, send me product updates, offers, and marketing announcements.
register.marketingEmailConsentNo: No, do not send me marketing broadcast emails.
register.marketingEmailConsentHelp: Required. You can change this later in App Settings.
register.adsAudienceConsent: Allow Citizens Hub to use my email and related purchase records for customer audience matching with Google and similar advertising platforms.
register.adsConsentHelp: Optional. You can change this later in App Settings.
market.adjustStockDescription: Enter a positive number to add stock or a negative number to reduce stock. The server applies this as an atomic stock delta update.
market.adjustStockLockedWarning: Projected stock cannot be lower than the currently locked quantity.
market.adjustStockNegativeWarning: Projected stock cannot be less than 0.
market.betaNotice: This page is a test deployment and orders run in a test environment. All listed items are test items. Please do not place an order.
market.credit.name: Store Credit
market.credit.poolDescription: One eligible seller is assigned automatically after payment. The order will not be split across multiple sellers.
market.trust.title: Own stock, no third-party sellers involved
market.trust.description: All items come directly from our own stock, with no third-party sellers involved, and are fully covered by our customer protection policy.
market.trust.deliveryWindow: We can usually deliver within 30 minutes when we're online.
market.trust.progressSupport: You can join our <discord>Discord</discord> or <ticket>submit a ticket</ticket> at any time to ask about progress.
market.detail.compare.description: Compare the current ship and the upgraded ship side by side before placing the order.

market.detail.ocShipNoticeBody: OC indicates an Original Concept ship listing. Please verify its original-concept status, insurance, and included contents before placing the order.
market.detail.importantInfo.title: Important Information
market.detail.importantInfo.accountRequi: To accept this item, you must have an account on robertspaceindustries.com.
market.detail.importantInfo.gamePackageR: Access to Star Citizen requires a game package.
market.detail.importantInfo.deliveryEmai: All orders will be sent to the email you enter at checkout. You will receive an email titled "Someone sent you a gift from Roberts Space Industries" from no-reply@robertsspaceindustries.com. Open the email and click the blue "claim gift" button to claim your order.
market.detail.importantInfo.otherAccount: If you want the order to end up in an account that is not attached to the email you provided, sign in to the correct RSI account in a separate tab before claiming the item, then refresh the RSI page to confirm you are on the right account.
market.detail.importantInfo.giftPurchase: If you are buying this item as a gift, right-click the blue "claim gift" button and copy the link address. Make sure you are logged out of your RSI account so you do not accidentally claim it yourself.
market.detail.importantInfo.claimOnce: Each item can only be claimed once before it becomes bound to the receiving account. Please make sure you are signed in to the correct account.

market.packageItemsEmpty: No extra items added yet. Add rows for text-only items or items with images.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
about.heading: About Us
about.subtitle: A free Star Citizen tool site with self-operated ships and CCUs available for purchase.
about.metaDescription: Citizens' Hub is a free Star Citizen tool site with self-operated ships and CCUs available for purchase, helping players save time and money.
about.hero.title: A free Star Citizen tool site, with self-operated ships and CCUs available.
about.hero.body1: Citizens' Hub is a free Star Citizen tool site. We also provide self-operated ships and CCUs for players who want to save time and money.
about.hero.body2: Use the tools to plan your fleet, compare upgrade paths, and check prices. If you decide to buy from us, the items listed in our market are handled by us directly.
about.stat.stock.label: Not outside seller listings
about.stat.delivery.label: Delivered within 24 hours, faster when we are online
about.stat.support.label: Talk to us directly if something comes up
about.feature.tools.title: Free tools first
about.feature.tools.body: Citizens' Hub started as a free Star Citizen tool site. CCU planning, price history, hangar tools, and order tracking are here to help you make a better decision before spending money.
about.feature.stock.title: Self-operated stock
about.feature.stock.body: When we list ships or CCUs for sale, they come from our own stock. We are not matching you with an unknown outside seller.
about.feature.delivery.title: 24-hour delivery
about.feature.delivery.body: We guarantee delivery within 24 hours. When we are online, orders are often handled much faster.
about.feature.support.title: Talk to us directly
about.feature.support.body: If you want to ask before buying or need help after payment, you can reach us through <discord>Discord</discord> or <ticket>support tickets</ticket>.
about.section.capabilitiesTitle: Tools are free. Market items are self-operated.
about.section.capabilitiesDescription: We keep the tools and the store in one place because they serve the same goal: helping you spend less time guessing and more time making the right choice.
about.workflow.title: You order on the site, and we handle the order from there.
about.workflow.description: You should not need to negotiate in private messages or hunt through several places for order records. We keep the order, payment, and follow-up path as close to the site as possible.
about.workflow.inventory.title: We prepare the stock first
about.workflow.inventory.body: Items available on the page are treated as our own stock, not something we need to hunt down from another seller after you pay.
about.workflow.checkout.title: You place the order on the site
about.workflow.checkout.body: Once you choose an item, checkout happens on the site. Item details, price, and order status stay on the page.
about.workflow.fulfillment.title: We deliver it
about.workflow.fulfillment.body: We process the order as quickly as we can and guarantee delivery within 24 hours.
about.workflow.aftercare.title: You can keep talking to us
about.workflow.aftercare.body: If you want an update, have a delivery question, or need help after the order, keep using Discord or support tickets to reach us.
about.registration.title: You can check the company behind the store.
about.registration.linkDescription: Citizens' Hub is operated by PARAVIA LIMITED. We keep the business registration document here for you to check.
about.registration.description: It does not replace actual service, but you should not have to guess who is behind the storefront.
about.registration.previewAlt: Business registration document for PARAVIA LIMITED
terms.heading: Terms of Service
refund.heading: Refund Policy

register.privacyPolicyConsent: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy.
settings.marketingEmailConsentDescriptio: Control whether Citizens Hub may send you marketing broadcast emails, including product updates, offers, and announcements.

settings.marketingEmailPromptSaveFailed: Failed to save your email preference. Please try again.
settings.adsConsentDescription: Control whether Citizens Hub may share your email and related first-party purchase data with advertising platforms such as Google to build or refresh customer audiences.
settings.adsAudienceConsent: Allow sharing my email and related first-party purchase data with Google and similar advertising platforms for customer audience matching and advertising targeting where permitted by law.
admin.googleAdsAudience.title: Google Ads Customer Match
admin.googleAdsAudience.description: Build or refresh Google Customer Match audiences from consented registered users. Keep paid buyers as a separate audience for stronger targeting, and use dry run to inspect the exact payload before sending a live batch.
admin.googleAdsAudience.loadError: Failed to load audience sync history.

admin.googleAdsAudience.oauthDescription: Authorize Google once from the admin panel so Citizens Hub can refresh Data Manager access tokens automatically.
admin.googleAdsAudience.oauthConfigMissi: Missing GOOGLE_AUTH_ID / GOOGLE_AUTH_SECRET or target Google Ads account configuration.

resourcesTable.column.name: Name
routeInfoPanel.conciergeTooltip: Fill in how many dollars it costs you to get $1 of concierge value. If you don't care about concierge value, enter 0. The actual cost of upgrading is calculated as dollars spent + RMB spent * exchange rate * (1 + concierge conversion ratio)
routeInfoPanel.newInvestmentExplanation: New investment includes costs from the last completed edge to the target ship, excluding hangar CCUs. If there are no completed edges, it will include the start ship price plus all non-hangar CCUs.
routeInfoPanel.noPrice: Some CCUs in this route are no longer valid
routeInfoPanel.pruneOptTooltip: If checked, the upgrade paths have been pruned to ensure calculations can be completed in a reasonable time. Only the first path is guaranteed to be optimal, not all possible alternatives are guaranteed to be shown
routeInfoPanel.routesTooltip: The upgrade paths have been pruned to ensure calculations can be completed in a reasonable time. Only the first path is guaranteed to be optimal, not all possible alternatives are guaranteed to be shown
routeInfoPanel.sortByNewInvestmentToolti: If checked, routes will be sorted by new investment cost. The cost of completed routes and hangar CCUs will not be included in the new investment.
routeInfoPanel.title: Alternative Upgrade Routes

admin.graphqlDebugger.title: GraphQL Debugger
admin.graphqlDebugger.description: Manually configure RSI GraphQL requests, run them through the browser extension, inspect responses, and save payloads to local storage for repeat testing.
admin.graphqlDebugger.payloadHelper: Paste a JSON object or a batch array copied from the browser network panel, then edit it manually as needed.
admin.graphqlDebugger.status.idle: Edit the payload, choose one of the two RSI GraphQL endpoints, then send the request through the browser extension.
admin.graphqlDebugger.responseEmpty: The response JSON will appear here after you send a request.
admin.graphqlDebugger.copySuccess: The response JSON has been copied.
admin.graphqlDebugger.copyFailure: Failed to copy the response JSON.
admin.graphqlDebugger.requirements: This tool sends requests through the Citizens Hub browser extension. Make sure the extension is installed and that the same browser is logged in on robertsspaceindustries.com.
admin.graphqlDebugger.saveSuccess: The request has been saved to local storage.
admin.graphqlDebugger.deleteSuccess: The saved request has been removed from local storage.
admin.graphqlDebugger.deleteConfirm: Delete the saved request "{name}" from local storage?
admin.graphqlDebugger.error.emptyPayload: Please enter a GraphQL JSON payload before sending the request.
admin.graphqlDebugger.error.invalidPaylo: The GraphQL payload must be a JSON object or array.
admin.graphqlDebugger.error.invalidJson: The payload is not valid JSON.
admin.graphqlDebugger.error.timeout: The browser extension request timed out. Make sure the Citizens Hub extension is installed, enabled, and that you are logged in on robertsspaceindustries.com.
admin.graphqlDebugger.chain.title: Request Chain Export
admin.graphqlDebugger.chain.description: Choose multiple saved requests, sort them manually, then export one JSON file containing the ordered chain and each request's latest response snapshot.
admin.graphqlDebugger.chain.addRequestHe: Only saved requests can be added to the exported chain.
admin.graphqlDebugger.chain.empty: No saved requests have been added to the export chain yet.
admin.graphqlDebugger.chain.exportEmpty: Select at least one saved request before exporting a request chain.
admin.graphqlDebugger.chain.exportSucces: Exported a request chain with {count} saved requests.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.title: RSI Auto Checkout
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.description: Poll RSI standalone ship listings through the browser extension, retry add-to-cart when the ship is out of stock, and complete the remaining checkout steps with per-run validate inputs.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.requirements: This tool runs entirely in the admin browser through the Citizens Hub extension. Make sure the extension is installed, enabled, and logged in on robertsspaceindustries.com before starting.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.warning.cart: Use an empty RSI cart before starting. The automation applies credit based on the matched ship price and does not clear or roll back existing cart contents when you stop it.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.warning.shipLis: The ship suggestion list failed to load. You can still enter the English ship name manually.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.shipNameHelp: The RSI listing match is exact on the English ship title/name and ignores stock in the browse step.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.pollIntervalHel: Used between failed listing or add-to-cart attempts.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.validateTokenHe: Provide the current cart validate token manually for this run only. It is not stored anywhere.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.validateMarkHel: Provide the current mark value manually for this run only. It is not stored anywhere.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.stopPending: Stop has been requested. The current RSI request will finish, and no further requests will be sent afterward.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.broadcastChanne: The extension requests a checkout reCAPTCHA token from an open RSI tab. Load the provider snippet in that tab first.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.tokenSourceHelp: Checkout tokens come from the browser extension token provider.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.error.timeout: The browser extension request timed out. Make sure the Citizens Hub extension is installed, enabled, and logged in on robertsspaceindustries.com.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.error.broadcast: The checkout token bridge is not available in this browser context.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.error.missingSh: Please enter the English ship name to match in the RSI store listing.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.error.missingVa: Please provide the validate mark value before starting the task.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.error.invalidPo: The poll interval must be a number greater than or equal to 500ms.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.error.unauthori: Your admin session is missing. Please log in again and retry.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.error.providerT: Token provider responded successfully, but no token was returned.
Token provider did not return a checkout token before the timeout expired.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.error.providerS: Token provider status check timed out.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.success.complet: The RSI checkout automation completed successfully.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.success.stopped: The RSI checkout automation stopped after the current request finished.
admin.rsiOrderAutomation.success.tokenRe: A checkout token was received and will be reused for up to 1 minute.
admin.recaptchaV3.title: reCAPTCHA v3 Score Probe
admin.recaptchaV3.description: Generate a real reCAPTCHA v3 token in the current browser session, verify it with the worker secret, and inspect the returned score, action, hostname, and error codes.
admin.recaptchaV3.note: reCAPTCHA v3 returns a risk score between 0 and 1. It is not a literal human probability, but you can treat score x 100% as a rough human-likeness indicator for quick checks.
admin.recaptchaV3.missingSiteKey: The frontend reCAPTCHA v3 site key is not configured.
admin.recaptchaV3.siteKeyMissingBanner: This app build does not have VITE_PUBLIC_RECAPTCHA_V3_SITE_KEY configured yet.
admin.recaptchaV3.siteKeyHelper: The public site key used by this frontend build.
admin.recaptchaV3.actionHelper: Use the same action naming style you plan to enforce on the backend.
admin.recaptchaV3.runCompletedWithFailur: reCAPTCHA v3 returned a verification result, but siteverify did not mark it as successful.
admin.recaptchaV3.runError: Failed to run the reCAPTCHA v3 assessment.

admin.rsiOrderAutomation.scheduledTasksH: Each task uses the local browser time zone and runs only while this page stays open.
